title: Concept Label Length Histogram
description: Interactive Chart.js visualization for concept label length histogram
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
chart.js
learningObjectives: Interpret a histogram of concept label lengths across a 200-concept learning graph, including its peak at 26 characters
Identify the key summary statistics of the label distribution: mean 23.77, median 24, range 11-36 characters, and standard deviation 5.15
Calculate the compliance rate with the 32-character label guideline from the counts shown in the chart
Explain why concept labels should be concise, descriptive, and under 32 characters to remain readable as graph node labels
